info.name: ReviewFlow API — Complete Test Suite
info.description:
Complete collection covering all ReviewFlow endpoints. Run in order: Auth → Courses → Assignments → Teams → Submissions → Evaluations → Notifications → Admin.

Base URL: http://localhost:8081/api/v1

Credentials:
- Admin:      admin@reviewflow.com / Admin@1234
- Instructor: sarah.johnson@university.edu / Test@1234
- Student:    jane.smith@university.edu / Test@1234

item.name: 01 — AUTH
item.description: Authentication endpoints. Run these first — they set cookies used by all other requests.

item.name: 02 — COURSES
item.description: Course management. Login as Admin first (01.11) before running these.

exec: // Login as student first then run this

item.name: 03 — ASSIGNMENTS
item.description: Assignment and rubric management. Login as Instructor before running.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Postman Test Assignment",
  "description": "Created via Postman test",
  "dueAt": "2026-05-01T23:59:00",
  "maxTeamSize": 4,
  "teamLockAt": "2026-04-15T23:59:00",
  "isPublished": false
}

exec: // Login as student first, then run this against an unpublished assignment

item.name: 04 — TEAMS
item.description: Team formation, invites and locking. Login as Student before running.

item.name: 04.04 List Teams for Assignment (Student sees own team only)
04.07 List All Teams — Instructor sees all

exec: // Switch to instructor session before this request

item.name: 05 — SUBMISSIONS
item.description: File upload and version tracking. Use form-data for upload requests.

formdata.description: Attach any small .zip or .pdf file here

item.name: 05.07 Student cannot access another team's submission (expect 403)
06 — EVALUATIONS
item.description: Rubric grading, draft/publish workflow. Login as Instructor before running.

exec: // Switch to student session before this request
pm.test('Draft not visible to student — 404', () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));

item.name: 07 — NOTIFICATIONS
item.description: Notification management. Works for all roles.

item.name: 07.06 Unread count is 0 after mark all read
08 — ADMIN
item.description: Admin-only endpoints. Login as Admin before running.

exec: // Switch to student session before this request

item.name: 09 — SECURITY TESTS
item.description: Security hardening feature tests: rate limiting, security headers, ClamAV malware scanning, and metrics.

exec: // Note: HSTS is disabled in local/dev profiles

item.name: 09.02 Trigger Login Rate Limit (5 failed attempts)

exec: // Run this request 6 times in a row
pm.test('Attempt ' + attemptNumber + ' — Status is 401 (wrong password)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(401));
pm.test('Attempt ' + attemptNumber + ' — Status is 429 (rate limited)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(429));

item.name: 09.03 Trigger Token Rate Limit (21 invalid tokens)

exec: // Run this request 21 times in a row to trigger rate limit
pm.test('Attempt ' + attemptNumber + ' — Status is 401 (invalid token)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(401));
pm.test('Attempt ' + attemptNumber + ' — Status is 429 (rate limited)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(429));

item.name: 09.04 Upload Blocked File (.exe) to Trigger Upload Block Rate Limit

exec: // Login as student first before running this test
// Run this request 11 times in a row
pm.test('Attempt ' + attemptNumber + ' — Status is 400 (blocked file type)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Attempt ' + attemptNumber + ' — Status is 429 (upload block rate limited)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(429));
pm.test('error message mentions blocked uploads', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().error.message).to.include('blocked upload'));

item.name: 09.05 Upload EICAR Test File (ClamAV Malware Detection)
